About Us

Quality Hardware
You Can Trust

AVADH Engineering is a dedicated hardware manufacturer based in India, producing premium-quality steel fittings trusted by furniture makers, plumbing contractors, and construction companies across the country.

Every piece we make starts with certified high-grade mild steel, goes through precision manufacturing, and receives a durable surface finish — whether white powder coating for brackets or zinc coating for pipe clamps — to ensure long service life in demanding environments.

We supply everything from small retail orders to large bulk consignments, with custom size manufacturing available on request.

⚙️
Precision Manufacturing

Exact dimensional tolerances — every batch, every time.

🛡️
Premium Finish

Powder coat & zinc coat for maximum durability.

📦
Bulk Supply Ready

Large orders fulfilled with consistent quality & timely dispatch.

🔧
Custom Sizes

Manufactured to your exact specifications on request.

Our Products

Precision
Hardware Range

Three precision-manufactured product lines — all available for bulk supply across India with custom sizes on request.

Product 01
Product 01 — L Corner Bracket

L CORNER
BRACKET

Strong · Durable · Precision Engineered

Premium-quality L Corner Brackets providing strong 90° support for furniture, cabinets, shelves, and wooden structures. High-grade mild steel with white powder-coated finish for excellent corrosion resistance and long-lasting performance.

Heavy-Duty Mild Steel White Powder Coated 90° Angle Support Rust & Corrosion Resistant Precision Hole Positioning Easy Installation Smooth Rounded Edges High Load Capacity
Available Sizes
1 Inch1.5 Inch2 Inch3 Inch
MaterialHigh-Grade Mild Steel
FinishWhite Powder Coated
Angle90° L-Shape
OriginMade in India 🇮🇳
Applications
Furniture AssemblyWall Shelves Wooden CabinetsWardrobes Kitchen FurnitureOffice Furniture Display RacksDIY Projects

Product 02
Product 02 — Pipe Clamp Fittings

PVC PIPE
CLAMP

Heavy-Duty · Zinc Coated · Secure Grip

Premium PVC Pipe Clamp Fittings for secure, reliable support of PVC, CPVC, UPVC, and conduit pipes. Mild steel with zinc coating provides excellent corrosion resistance for indoor and outdoor use across residential, commercial, and industrial applications.

Heavy-Duty Mild Steel Zinc Coated Finish Rust & Corrosion Resistant Strong Grip Support Easy Installation Indoor & Outdoor Use High Load Capacity Long Service Life
Available Pipe Sizes
½"¾"1" 1¼"1½"2" 2½"3"4"6"
MaterialHeavy-Duty Mild Steel (MS)
FinishZinc Coated
MountWall & Ceiling
OriginMade in India 🇮🇳
Applications
PVC Pipe InstallationUPVC Plumbing CPVC Water PipelinesConduit Pipes Drainage SystemsBuilding Construction Industrial PlantsInfrastructure
📞 Call Us ✉ Email
Product 03
Product 03 — Bed Joint Bracket

BED JOINT
BRACKET

Strong · Durable · Secure Furniture Joint

Heavy Duty Bed Joint L Brackets for strong and reliable connections in beds, wardrobes, and wooden furniture. Precision-engineered from high-grade mild steel with a corrosion-resistant finish — designed to hold heavy furniture securely for years.

Heavy-Duty Mild Steel Precision Engineered Corrosion-Resistant Easy Installation Smooth Premium Edges Nut Bolts Included Long Service Life Heavy Furniture Use
Package Contents — 1 Set

4 Heavy Duty Bed Joint L Brackets + 8 Nut Bolts (2 per bracket)

Size60 mm × 40 mm
Thickness4 mm
Packing1 Set (4 Pcs + 8 Nut Bolts)
OriginMade in India 🇮🇳
Applications
Wooden BedsBed Frame Assembly WardrobesCabinets Sofa FramesModular Furniture Carpenter Projects

How We Work

From Steel to
Your Hands

→
01
🔩

Raw Material

We source only certified high-grade mild steel — the foundation of every bracket and clamp we make.

→
02
⚙️

Precision Manufacture

Each piece is cut, bent, and drilled to exact tolerances using precision tooling and industrial machinery.

→
03
🛡️

Surface Finishing

Powder coating or zinc coating applied for maximum corrosion resistance and a clean, lasting finish.

04
📦

QC & Dispatch

Every batch passes strict quality inspection before packing and dispatch across India.
